caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and large over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain and a watch on his left wrist. In the background, a white wall features the repeated words "EMPIRE HUSTLE" accompanied by gold stars. A logo for "BOSS TALK 101" appears on the wall behind him and as an on-screen overlay in the bottom corners of the image, accompanied by the text "PODCAST". The man's black t-shirt has the phrase "CHECK IT" printed on the front. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points, shifting from an open-handed gesture on his left side to a more contained position, and finally raising his right hand. His facial expression remains focused and serious as he speaks.
